free_text: Measurement of deuteron induced gamma-ray emission
differential cross sections on natCl from 1.0 to 2.0
Gamma-rays were detected by a P-type HPGe
coaxial detector placed at a right angle with respect
to the beamline direction and at a distance of 51.9
The scattered deuterons were detected by ion-
implanted silicon detector placed at an angle of 165
degree relative to the incident beam direction.
Uncertainty of the deuteron beam energy 2 keV.
BaCl2 thin film was prepared by vacuum evaporation of
natural BaCl2 onto a 50 um-thick Mo foil.
determined from the following partial uncertainties:
